name: Scratch Storage Management
summary: Inspect scratch, project, and working-directory usage before HPC jobs.
description: This skill helps users inventory user-owned storage, identify large files and directories, and prepare a safe cleanup or staging plan before running storage-sensitive HPC workloads.

inputs.name: target_path
inputs.description: Directory to inspect, such as a scratch, project, or workflow working directory.

outputs.name: storage_inventory
outputs.description: Read-only report of filesystem capacity, largest top-level entries, and large-file candidates.

outputs.name: cleanup_plan
outputs.description: Human-reviewed list of files or directories to archive, move, regenerate, or delete outside the script.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Run against a small test directory and confirm the report is read-only and identifies top-level usage.
